text: Kal raat bete se mere ilaaj ke kharche par behas hui, usne saaf bol diya ki itne paise nahi hain. Main janti hoon ki wo thak gaya hai, par 'log kya kahenge' ki buzurg baap ko bina dawa ke chhod diya, is darr se maine keh diya ki mujhe ab dard nahi ho raha. Rishte me kadwahat na aaye isliye maine apni takleef chhupa li aur uski haan me haan mila di.

Joint family me reh kar bhi kal raat ki behas ke baad laga ki main bilkul akeli hoon jab bete ne meri baat beech me hi kaat di. Main unhe unke sanskaron ki yaad dilana chahti thi, par ghar ki shanti aur 'izzat' ke khatir main chup ho gayi. Unka dhyan rakhna mera farz hai, isliye maine gussa karne ke bajaye subah unhe nashta de kar maafi maang li taaki parivaar me darar na aaye.

Kal raat bahu ke sath meri thodi anban hui aur bete ne bina soche mera hi kasoor nikal diya. Main unhe bolna chahti thi ki saas-bahu dynamics me wo hamesha galat nahi hoti, par unke authoritarian control ke aage meri awaaz nahi nikli. Rishton ka lihaz karte hue maine apne aansu pee liye taaki padosiyon ko hamare ghar ke kalesh ka pata na chale.

Bete ne kal raat saaf keh diya ki ab parivaar ke saare faisle wahi lega aur meri ray ki zaroorat nahi hai. Mera man bohot dukha par ek vidhwa maa hone ke naate main uspar bojh nahi banna chahti, isliye maine chupchap uski baat maan li. Apne bete ki nazron me apni izzat bachane ke liye maine usse dubara behas nahi ki aur khud ko kamre me band kar liya.

Kal raat ki kadwi baaton ke baad bete ne mujhse seedhe munh baat nahi ki, par maine subah uth kar uska favorite khana banaya. Main janti hoon unka generational gap aur meri purani soch clash karti hai, par parivaar ko jod kar rakhna meri duty hai. Unhe bura na lage aur unka ashirwad bana rahe, bas isi umeed me maine apni self-respect side me rakh di.
